targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS "총 에러 수"
FROM traces t
JOIN observations o ON t.id = o.trace_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) AND o.level::text = 'ERROR';

SELECT ROUND(
  100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.level::text = 'ERROR' THEN t.id END)
  / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT t.id), 0)
, 2) AS "에러율 (%)"
FROM traces t
LEFT JOIN observations o ON t.id = o.trace_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(t.timestamp);

SELECT
  t.timestamp AS "time",
  t.name AS "trace_name",
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(o.end_time) - MIN(o.start_time))) AS "calculated_duration_sec"
FROM traces t
JOIN observations o ON t.id = o.trace_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(t.timestamp)
GROUP BY t.id, t.timestamp, t.name
ORDER BY t.timestamp ASC;

panels.title: Trace 별 소요 시간 - 바 차트 (s)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  t.timestamp AS "time",
  t.name AS "trace_name",
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(o.end_time) - MIN(o.start_time))) AS "calculated_duration_sec"
FROM traces t
JOIN observations o ON t.id = o.trace_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(t.timestamp)
GROUP BY t.id, t.timestamp, t.name
ORDER BY t.timestamp ASC;

SELECT AVG(duration_sec) as "Avg Duration"
FROM (
  SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(o.end_time) - MIN(o.start_time))) AS duration_sec
  FROM traces t
  JOIN observations o ON t.id = o.trace_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(t.timestamp)
  GROUP BY t.id
) sub;

SELECT
  t.timestamp AS "Time",
  t.name AS "Name",
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(o.end_time) - MIN(o.start_time))) AS "Duration (s)",
  t.id AS "Trace ID",
  t.user_id AS "User"
FROM traces t
JOIN observations o ON t.id = o.trace_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(t.timestamp)
GROUP BY t.id, t.timestamp, t.name, t.user_id
ORDER BY "Duration (s)" DESC;

SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(start_time, '1h'),
  SUM(COALESCE(total_tokens, 0)) AS "Total Tokens"
FROM observations
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(t.timestamp, '1h'),
  COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS "Errors"
FROM traces t
JOIN observations o ON t.id = o.trace_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) AND o.level::text = 'ERROR'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(start_time, '1h'),
  SUM(COALESCE(prompt_tokens, 0)) AS "입력 토큰 (Prompt)",
  SUM(COALESCE(completion_tokens, 0)) AS "출력 토큰 (Completion)"
FROM observations
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(start_time, '1h'),
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE level::text = 'ERROR') AS "ERROR 건수",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE level::text = 'WARNING') AS "WARNING 건수"
FROM observations
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  type AS "Type",
  COUNT(*) AS "Count"
FROM observations
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
GROUP BY type
ORDER BY "Count" DESC;

SELECT
  COALESCE(model, '(Unknown)') AS "Model",
  SUM(COALESCE(total_tokens, 0)) AS "Total Tokens"
FROM observations
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time) AND model IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY model
ORDER BY "Total Tokens" DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  COALESCE(user_id, '(없음)') AS "User",
  COUNT(*) AS "Trace 수"
FROM traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY user_id
ORDER BY "Trace 수" DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_sec) AS "P50 (s)",
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.90) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_sec) AS "P90 (s)",
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_sec) AS "P95 (s)",
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_sec) AS "P99 (s)"
FROM (
  SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(o.end_time) - MIN(o.start_time))) AS duration_sec
  FROM traces t
  JOIN observations o ON t.id = o.trace_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(t.timestamp)
  GROUP BY t.id
) sub;

SELECT
  sub.trace_name AS "Trace Name",
  ROUND(AVG(sub.duration_sec)::numeric, 3) AS "평균 소요시간 (s)"
FROM (
  SELECT
    t.name AS trace_name,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(o.end_time) - MIN(o.start_time))) AS duration_sec
  FROM traces t
  JOIN observations o ON t.id = o.trace_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(t.timestamp)
  GROUP BY t.id, t.name
) sub
GROUP BY sub.trace_name
ORDER BY "평균 소요시간 (s)" DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  o.start_time AS "Time",
  t.name AS "Trace Name",
  o.name AS "Observation Name",
  o.type AS "Type",
  o.level::text AS "Level",
  t.session_id AS "Session ID",
  o.trace_id AS "Trace ID"
FROM observations o
JOIN traces t ON o.trace_id = t.id
WHERE $__timeFilter(o.start_time)
  AND o.level::text IN ('ERROR', 'WARNING')
ORDER BY o.start_time DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT
  COALESCE(model, '(Unknown)') AS "Model",
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (end_time - start_time)))::numeric, 3) AS "평균 응답시간 (s)"
FROM observations
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND model IS NOT NULL
  AND end_time IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY model
ORDER BY "평균 응답시간 (s)" DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  COALESCE(model, '(Unknown)') AS "Model",
  COUNT(*) AS "호출 수",
  SUM(COALESCE(prompt_tokens, 0)) AS "입력 토큰",
  SUM(COALESCE(completion_tokens, 0)) AS "출력 토큰",
  SUM(COALESCE(total_tokens, 0)) AS "총 토큰",
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (end_time - start_time)))::numeric, 3) AS "평균 응답시간 (s)"
FROM observations
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time) AND model IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY model
ORDER BY "총 토큰" DESC;

SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(timestamp, '1h'),
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS "활성 사용자 수"
FROM traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND user_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  COALESCE(t.user_id, '(없음)') AS "User",
  SUM(COALESCE(o.total_tokens, 0)) AS "총 토큰 사용량"
FROM traces t
JOIN observations o ON t.id = o.trace_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(t.timestamp)
GROUP BY t.user_id
ORDER BY "총 토큰 사용량" DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT ROUND(AVG(trace_count)::numeric, 1) AS "세션당 평균 Trace 수"
FROM (
  SELECT session_id, COUNT(*) AS trace_count
  FROM traces
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND session_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY session_id
) sub;

SELECT ROUND(AVG(token_sum)::numeric, 0) AS "세션당 평균 토큰"
FROM (
  SELECT t.session_id, SUM(COALESCE(o.total_tokens, 0)) AS token_sum
  FROM traces t
  JOIN observations o ON t.id = o.trace_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) AND t.session_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY t.session_id
) sub;

SELECT ROUND(AVG(duration_sec)::numeric, 2) AS "세션 평균 총 소요시간 (s)"
FROM (
  SELECT t.session_id, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(o.end_time) - MIN(o.start_time))) AS duration_sec
  FROM traces t
  JOIN observations o ON t.id = o.trace_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) AND t.session_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY t.session_id
) sub;

SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(timestamp, '1h'),
  COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS "활성 세션 수"
FROM traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND session_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  LEFT(session_id::text, 16) || '...' AS "Session ID",
  COUNT(*) AS "Trace 수"
FROM traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND session_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY session_id
ORDER BY "Trace 수" DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  LEFT(t.session_id::text, 16) || '...' AS "Session ID",
  SUM(COALESCE(o.total_tokens, 0)) AS "총 토큰 사용량"
FROM traces t
JOIN observations o ON t.id = o.trace_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) AND t.session_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY t.session_id
ORDER BY "총 토큰 사용량" DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  LEFT(sub.session_id::text, 16) || '...' AS "Session ID",
  ROUND(AVG(sub.duration_sec)::numeric, 2) AS "평균 Trace 소요시간 (s)"
FROM (
  SELECT
    t.session_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(o.end_time) - MIN(o.start_time))) AS duration_sec
  FROM traces t
  JOIN observations o ON t.id = o.trace_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) AND t.session_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY t.session_id, t.id
) sub
GROUP BY sub.session_id
ORDER BY "평균 Trace 소요시간 (s)" DESC
LIMIT 10;

WITH trace_stats AS (
  SELECT
    t.id AS trace_id,
    t.session_id,
    t.user_id,
    t.timestamp,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(o.end_time) - MIN(o.start_time))) AS duration_sec,
    SUM(COALESCE(o.total_tokens, 0)) AS tokens,
    MAX(CASE WHEN o.level::text = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_error
  FROM traces t
  JOIN observations o ON t.id = o.trace_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) AND t.session_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY t.id, t.session_id, t.user_id, t.timestamp
)
SELECT
  session_id AS "Session ID",
  MIN(timestamp) AS "시작 시간",
  MAX(timestamp) AS "마지막 활동",
  COUNT(*) AS "Trace 수",
  COALESCE(MAX(user_id), '(없음)') AS "User",
  SUM(tokens) AS "총 토큰",
  ROUND(AVG(duration_sec)::numeric, 2) AS "평균 소요시간 (s)",
  SUM(has_error) AS "에러 수"
FROM trace_stats
GROUP BY session_id
ORDER BY "마지막 활동" DESC;

SELECT
  t.timestamp AS "Time",
  t.name AS "Trace Name",
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(o.end_time) - MIN(o.start_time)))::numeric, 2) AS "소요시간 (s)",
  SUM(COALESCE(o.total_tokens, 0)) AS "총 토큰",
  MAX(o.level::text) AS "Level",
  t.user_id AS "User",
  t.id AS "Trace ID"
FROM traces t
JOIN observations o ON t.id = o.trace_id
WHERE t.session_id = '${session_id}'
GROUP BY t.id, t.timestamp, t.name, t.user_id
ORDER BY t.timestamp ASC;

SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(start_time, '1h'),
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE type = 'SPAN') AS "SPAN",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE type = 'GENERATION') AS "GENERATION",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE type = 'EVENT') AS "EVENT"
FROM observations
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  o.start_time AS "시작 시간",
  o.name AS "Observation 이름",
  o.type AS "타입",
  COALESCE(o.model, '-') AS "모델",
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (o.end_time - o.start_time))::numeric, 3) AS "소요시간 (s)",
  COALESCE(o.total_tokens, 0) AS "총 토큰",
  o.level::text AS "레벨"
FROM observations o
WHERE $__timeFilter(o.start_time)
ORDER BY o.start_time DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT
  id AS "id",
  name AS "title",
  type AS "subTitle",
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(end_time, start_time) - start_time)) AS "mainStat",
  CASE WHEN level::text = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "secondaryStat"
FROM observations
WHERE trace_id = '${trace_id}';

SELECT
  parent_observation_id AS "source",
  id AS "target",
  id AS "id"
FROM observations
WHERE parent_observation_id IS NOT NULL
  AND trace_id = '${trace_id}';

list.definition: SELECT id AS "__value", COALESCE(name, id::text) || '  [' || TO_CHAR(timestamp, 'MM-DD HH24:MI') || ']' AS "__text" FROM traces WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 200
list.label: Trace ID
list.name: trace_id
list.query: SELECT id AS "__value", COALESCE(name, id::text) || '  [' || TO_CHAR(timestamp, 'MM-DD HH24:MI') || ']' AS "__text" FROM traces WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 200

list.definition: SELECT session_id AS "__value", LEFT(session_id::text, 20) || '...  [' || TO_CHAR(MAX(timestamp), 'MM-DD HH24:MI') || ']' AS "__text" FROM traces WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND session_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY session_id ORDER BY MAX(timestamp) DESC LIMIT 200
list.label: Session ID
list.name: session_id
list.query: SELECT session_id AS "__value", LEFT(session_id::text, 20) || '...  [' || TO_CHAR(MAX(timestamp), 'MM-DD HH24:MI') || ']' AS "__text" FROM traces WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND session_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY session_id ORDER BY MAX(timestamp) DESC LIMIT 200
